name: Bubble Endcap Dip and Blow Flowers - Sun Squad™: Kids Plastic Toy Wand
description:
The Bubble Endcap Dip and Blow Flowers from Sun Squad™ is a fun and interactive toy designed to bring endless bubble-blasting excitement. Featuring a lightweight design, this flower pot-themed blower allows kids to easily dip and blast bubbles for a thrilling playtime experience. Great for outdoor fun, parties or summer entertainment, this bubble blower is sure to keep little ones engaged for hours.

Sun Squad™: Ready for fun.
